stemHtml: The main difference between turbulence and a wind gust is:

options.a: A gust is only a sudden increase in wind speed while turbulence is associated with specific weather patterns.
options.b: Turbulence is a sudden increase in wind speed that occurs only occasionally.
options.c: Gusts can be called wind shears under certain conditions.
options.d: Wind shear is always associated with thunderstorms.
